ArgumentListWrapping:BranchingServiceTest.kt$BranchingServiceTest$(result.isEmpty(), "When neither dev-status nor Bitbucket filter finds a match, result must be empty; got: $result")

ArgumentListWrapping:JiraApiClientSearchIssuesTest.kt$JiraApiClientSearchIssuesTest$(0, server.requestCount, "No HTTP request must be made when input exceeds MAX_SEARCH_TEXT_LENGTH")
ArgumentListWrapping:JiraApiClientSearchIssuesTest.kt$JiraApiClientSearchIssuesTest$(1, server.requestCount, "Exactly one HTTP request must be made for text of exactly MAX_SEARCH_TEXT_LENGTH")
ArgumentListWrapping:JiraApiClientSearchIssuesTest.kt$JiraApiClientSearchIssuesTest$(ErrorType.VALIDATION_ERROR, err.type, "Control character in text must map to VALIDATION_ERROR, got: ${err.type}")
ArgumentListWrapping:JiraApiClientSearchIssuesTest.kt$JiraApiClientSearchIssuesTest$(ErrorType.VALIDATION_ERROR, err.type, "Oversized text must map to VALIDATION_ERROR, got: ${err.type}")

ArgumentListWrapping:JiraApiClientTest.kt$JiraApiClientTest$(err.message.contains("HTML", ignoreCase = true), "Error message should mention HTML, got: ${err.message}")

ArgumentListWrapping:JiraServiceImplTest.kt$JiraServiceImplTest$(2, server.requestCount, "Exactly two HTTP requests must be issued — page 1 (success) and page 2 (failure)")

ArgumentListWrapping:JiraServiceImplTest.kt$JiraServiceImplTest$(3, result.data!!.size, "All issues across all sections must be returned, not just one section.")
ArgumentListWrapping:JiraServiceImplTest.kt$JiraServiceImplTest$(result.data.isNullOrEmpty(), "total=0 response must yield an empty list, got: ${result.data}")
ArgumentListWrapping:JiraServiceImplTest.kt$JiraServiceImplTest$(result.isError, "A 401 on the second page must propagate as an error, discarding already-collected page 1 data")

ComplexCondition:JiraApiClient.kt$JiraApiClient$targetUri == null || baseUri == null || !targetUri.host.equals(baseUri.host, ignoreCase = true) || targetUri.scheme != baseUri.scheme

DestructuringDeclarationWithTooManyEntries:DevStatusSection.kt$DevStatusSection$val (badgeBg, badgeFg, borderColor, textFg) = when (statusText) { "OPEN" -> Quad(OPEN_BADGE_BG, OPEN_BADGE_FG, OPEN_BORDER, OPEN_TEXT) "MERGED" -> Quad(MERGED_BADGE_BG, MERGED_BADGE_FG, MERGED_BORDER, MERGED_TEXT) "DECLINED" -> Quad(DECLINED_BADGE_BG, DECLINED_BADGE_FG, DECLINED_BORDER, StatusColors.ERROR) else -> Quad(DEFAULT_BADGE_BG, StatusColors.SECONDARY_TEXT, StatusColors.BORDER, StatusColors.SECONDARY_TEXT) }

MultiLineIfElse:DevStatusSection.kt$DevStatusSection$"Could not load dev status (${bundle.fetchErrors} of 6 feeds errored)."
MultiLineIfElse:JiraServiceImpl.kt$fields.attachment.map { att -> JiraAttachmentData(id = att.id, filename = att.filename, mimeType = att.mimeType, sizeBytes = att.size) }

MultiLineIfElse:JiraServiceImpl.kt$fields.issuelinks.mapNotNull { link -> val linked = link.inwardIssue ?: link.outwardIssue ?: return@mapNotNull null val relationship = if (link.inwardIssue != null) link.type.inward else link.type.outward JiraLinkedIssueRef( key = linked.key, summary = linked.fields.summary, status = linked.fields.status.name, relationship = relationship ) }
MultiLineIfElse:JiraServiceImpl.kt$fields.subtasks.map { st -> JiraSubtaskRef( key = st.key, summary = st.fields.summary, status = st.fields.status.name ) }
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:JiraTicketProviderImpl.kt$JiraTicketProviderImpl$/** Set to true in tests to skip the ConnectionSettings lookup. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:SprintDashboardPanel.kt$SprintDashboardPanel$/** Snapshot of the sprint list so we can restore it when leaving filter view. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:SprintDashboardPanel.kt$SprintDashboardPanel$/** When non-null, the ticket list is showing JQL results from a saved filter rather than sprint data. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:StartWorkDialog.kt$StartWorkDialog$// Always build the dual-mode panel when we might show existing branches for ANY repo,
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:TicketKeyCache.kt$TicketKeyCache.Companion$/** Limit regex matches to prevent catastrophic backtracking on malicious patterns (SEC-22). */
UnusedPrivateMember:TicketDetailPanel.kt$TicketDetailPanel$private fun createInfoCard(title: String, contentBuilder: JPanel.() -> Unit): JPanel
Wrapping:ChangelogSection.kt$ChangelogSection$(JBLabel(rowText).apply { font = font.deriveFont(Font.PLAIN, JBUI.scale(11).toFloat()) foreground = JBColor.foreground() }, BorderLayout.WEST)
Wrapping:JiraServiceImpl.kt$JiraServiceImpl${ log.warn("[JiraService] branches fetch failed: ${branchesResult.message}"); fetchErrors++; emptyList() }
Wrapping:JiraServiceImpl.kt$JiraServiceImpl${ log.warn("[JiraService] builds fetch failed: ${buildsResult.message}"); fetchErrors++; emptyList() }
Wrapping:JiraServiceImpl.kt$JiraServiceImpl${ log.warn("[JiraService] commits fetch failed: ${commitsResult.message}"); fetchErrors++; emptyList() }
Wrapping:JiraServiceImpl.kt$JiraServiceImpl${ log.warn("[JiraService] deployments fetch failed: ${deploymentsResult.message}"); fetchErrors++; emptyList() }
Wrapping:JiraServiceImpl.kt$JiraServiceImpl${ log.warn("[JiraService] reviews fetch failed: ${reviewsResult.message}"); fetchErrors++; emptyList() }
Wrapping:SprintDashboardPanel.kt$SprintDashboardPanel$(JBScrollPane(ticketList).apply { border = JBUI.Borders.emptyTop(4) isOpaque = false viewport.isOpaque = false }, "list")

Wrapping:TicketDetailPanel.kt$TicketDetailPanel$(JBLabel("${comments.size - 20} more comments — open in Jira to see all").apply { foreground = StatusColors.SECONDARY_TEXT font = font.deriveFont(JBUI.scale(10).toFloat()) border = JBUI.Borders.empty(4, 8) }, BorderLayout.CENTER)

Wrapping:TicketDetailPanel.kt$TicketDetailPanel$(JBLabel("Attachments (${attachments.size})").apply { font = font.deriveFont(Font.BOLD, JBUI.scale(13).toFloat()) foreground = JBColor.foreground() border = JBUI.Borders.emptyLeft(2) }, BorderLayout.WEST)
Wrapping:TicketDetailPanel.kt$TicketDetailPanel$(JBLabel("Loading comments...").apply { foreground = JBColor.GRAY; border = JBUI.Borders.empty(8) }, BorderLayout.CENTER)
Wrapping:TicketDetailPanel.kt$TicketDetailPanel$(JBLabel("No comments").apply { foreground = StatusColors.SECONDARY_TEXT border = JBUI.Borders.empty(8) }, BorderLayout.CENTER)
Wrapping:WorklogSection.kt$WorklogSection$(JBLabel(commentText).apply { font = font.deriveFont(Font.ITALIC, JBUI.scale(10).toFloat()) foreground = StatusColors.SECONDARY_TEXT }, BorderLayout.WEST)
